# Secret Hour

> Quiet luxuries for married couples in Pakistan — card games, candles, and intimate gift sets.

Secret Hour is a Pakistani direct-to-consumer brand that sells thoughtfully designed products for married couples. All products are designed to help couples slow down, reconnect, and build intimate rituals. The brand ships free across Pakistan with discreet, unmarked packaging.

## Products

- [The Midnight Deck — Couples Card Game](https://secrethour.pk/product/the-midnight-deck): A card game for married couples with playful dares and meaningful questions. Rs. 2,999. Best-seller.
- [Bridal Box](https://secrethour.pk/product/bridal-box): A curated luxury gift set for newly married couples. Designed for wedding nights and nikkah gifts.
- [Midnight Glow Candle](https://secrethour.pk/product/midnight-glow-candle): A luxury scented candle for intimate evenings. Rs. 1,499.
- [Silk Bond](https://secrethour.pk/product/silk-bond): An intimate set for married couples. Rs. 999.
- [Shop all products](https://secrethour.pk/shop)

## Key information

- [FAQ](https://secrethour.pk/info/faq): Delivery times, payment options, packaging, and returns
- [About Us](https://secrethour.pk/about): Brand story and values
- [Shipping Policy](https://secrethour.pk/info/shipping): Free delivery across all of Pakistan, 2–5 business days
- [Refund & Returns](https://secrethour.pk/info/returns): 7-day return window on unopened items
- [Testimonials](https://secrethour.pk/testimonials): Reviews from couples across Pakistan
- [Contact](https://secrethour.pk/contact): Email info@secrethour.pk or WhatsApp

## Target audience

Married couples in Pakistan (all ages and stages of marriage). Products are designed to be culturally appropriate and are sold with full discretion.

## Pricing

All prices in Pakistani Rupees (PKR). Free delivery across Pakistan on all orders. 10% discount when paying via bank transfer.
